page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg6.10xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 3.1 GHz. It features 40 physical cores and 40 vCPUs, providing a 1:1 thread-to-core mapping. The system is configured with 192.0 GB of RAM, yielding 4.8 GB of memory per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps.

Benchmark data shows average performance across most standard workloads. The single-core Geekbench score is 1289.0, and the multi-core score is 12045.0. Notably, the server demonstrates strong multi-threaded performance in bzip3 decompression, reaching 166.28 GB/sec, which falls into the top 25% of tested systems. Memory bandwidth is measured at 108.89 GB/sec for large uncached reads and 48.09 GB/sec for large uncached writes. For AI workloads, the system processes 135M parameter LLM prompts at 1841.39 tokens/sec and generates text at 76.66 tokens/sec, while a medium 7B model runs at 56.94 tokens/sec for prompt processing and 12.71 tokens/sec for text generation.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.hfg6.10xlarge offers a balanced resource density with dedicated CPU allocation, making it a stable option for workloads requiring predictable compute performance without the overhead of shared-core environments. The lack of bundled local storage means storage costs are externalized to network volumes, which should be factored into deployment planning. This server is well-suited for multi-threaded data processing, web serving, software compilation, and general-purpose enterprise applications that benefit from high clock-speed Intel Xeon processors and a balanced memory-to-CPU ratio.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg6.10xlarge is an x86_64 server featuring a dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY processor with 40 physical cores and 40 vCPUs running at 3.1 GHz. It is equipped with 192.0 GB of RAM, providing 4.8 GB per core, and a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps. The server does not include local storage or GPU accelerators. In benchmark testing, the instance delivers solid mid-range performance, highlighted by strong multi-threaded bzip3 decompression speeds of 166.28 GB/sec. It also demonstrates steady capabilities in software compilation, database operations, and small-to-medium LLM inference. Given its dedicated CPU allocation and balanced memory-to-core ratio, this server is highly suitable for general-purpose enterprise workloads, multi-threaded data processing, and web serving applications requiring consistent compute performance.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg6.10xlarge is a dedicated Intel Xeon server with 40 vCPUs, 192 GB RAM, and 12 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering reliable performance for general-purpose and multi-threaded workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg6.10xlarge features 40 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 192 GB RAM, and 12 Gbps network bandwidth for consistent enterprise performance.
tagline: A dedicated Intel Xeon server offering balanced compute and memory resources for consistent multi-threaded processing and enterprise applications.

192.0 GB of RAM providing 4.8 GB per core
No bundled local storage or GPU acceleration
Best suited for enterprise applications, web serving, and data processing
